svg.title: Beirut skyline with cedar tree overlooking the Mediterranean, Victorian engraving style
svg.desc: Dense cross-hatched pen-and-ink illustration of Beirut's characteristic architecture — flat-roofed Ottoman and French mandate buildings with arched windows and balconies — clustered on a hillside descending to the Mediterranean sea. A cedar of Lebanon stands in the foreground. Heavy hatching throughout gives the image weight and darkness.
